title: Genetic Part
description: A reusable genetic part for building whole-cell CRISPR biosensors: promoters, RBSs, terminators, dCas9/Cas variants, sgRNA scaffolds, reporters/outputs, riboswitches, and regulators. Reporters are parts with category 'reporter'.

sequence.description: Nucleotide (or amino-acid for some CDS) sequence, when from a defined source.

partId.description: Registry id (iGEM BBa_, Addgene, SEVA, UniProt).

hosts.description: Hosts it works in, e.g. 'E. coli', 'B. subtilis', 'yeast', 'broad-host'.

label.description: Optional friendly label for pickers (e.g. 'Green fluorescence (sfGFP)').

readout.description: Reporter parts: how the signal is observed.

instrumentFree.description: Reporter parts: visible without an instrument.

strength.description: Promoter parts: e.g. constitutive-strong, weak, inducible.

pamOrPfs.description: dCas9/Cas parts: required PAM or PFS.
